title: Submission evidence index (WI-20)
description: The formal evidence model. Every readiness claim, scan family, generated artifact, and confirmed finding registers an entry here so HAVE/SATISFIED is always backed by an on-disk, hash-verified file the toolkit produced — never an un-evidenced self-attestation. Written to <target>/.security-review/evidence/index.json. The Submission Completeness Index (compute-sci.mjs) reads it; compile-submission's readiness-tracker links each row to it.

generated.description: ISO date the index was last written

ref_type.description: requirement = a baseline id this evidence satisfies; finding = a ledger finding id; artifact = a generated submission doc; scan = a scan-family evidence file

ref_id.description: the baseline id (for requirement), ledger finding id, artifact slug, or scan-family key this entry is evidence for

collected_by.description: agent = an LLM finder/synthesizer; scanner = a mechanical tool; owner = a human action the agent cannot perform (portal scan, signature)

how.description: how the evidence was verified, e.g. 'file exists + sha256 + adversarial-verifier confirmed', 'scanner exit + parsed report', 'owner-signed'. An entry with verified.value=false is PARTIAL, never SATISFIED.

reviewer_reproducible.description: Whether the Salesforce reviewer could INDEPENDENTLY reproduce this evidence. TRUE for scanner reports the reviewer re-runs (Code Analyzer / SFGE / the Checkmarx portal scan / gitleaks / Semgrep / OSV), owner-signed artifacts and attestations, and structural N/A confirmations a reviewer can also verify (e.g. 'no IaC in repo'). FALSE (or absent) for a clear that rests ONLY on this toolkit's own white-box LLM static audit. THE CREDIT RULE: compute-sci.mjs counts a requirement SATISFIED only on a reviewer_reproducible=true entry, and FAILS CLOSED when the field is absent — a satisfied/verified entry without it is treated as statically-cleared, never SATISFIED. This is set DETERMINISTICALLY by harness/build-evidence-index.mjs from the evidence SOURCE/location, never asserted by an LLM.

location.description: path to the evidence file, relative to the target repo root

sha256.description: sha256 of the evidence file at registration time (optional; recorded when the agent can hash it)

timestamp.description: ISO time the evidence was registered

disposition.description: rollup status this evidence confers on its ref. 'satisfied' (credits the SCI) requires reviewer_reproducible=true. 'statically-cleared' = the toolkit's own white-box static audit found the class clean but with NO reviewer-reproducible scanner/owner evidence — surfaced as a SEPARATE signal, NEVER counted SATISFIED and NEVER clears the blocker floor (Salesforce pen-tests these classes regardless). 'pending-owner' = the agent did its part, a human action remains; 'partial' = drafted, owner completes/signs.
